---
name: Script request
about: Request a new script or enhancement to an existing one
title: "[Script Request] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What task should the script handle?

## Current Process

How is this handled today?

## Desired Outcome

What should the finished script do?

## Inputs and Dependencies

List any known parameters, credentials model, modules, vendor tools, or external systems.

## Safety Notes

Call out whether the script would be read only, remediation, install, uninstall, BIOS, TPM, BitLocker, AD, or ConfigMgr related.

## Extra Context

Add examples, constraints, or environment details.
